children.name: is deterministic — a resubmission can never mint a second UTI
is deterministic, LEI-prefixed, and ≤52 uppercase alphanumerics

is DISTINCT from the EMIR UTI for the same execution — one identifier per regime
a correctly built pair MATCHES
firm GIVEs the securities, client TAKEs, under one UTI with mirrored counterparties

same-side reports are UNMATCHED with the sides-not-opposite break

accepts a trade within the notional limit
accepts a trade at exactly the $1m notional limit
rejects a trade exceeding the $1m single-order notional limit
rejects non-positive quantity
rejects when notional would overflow safe integers
rejects fractional quantity
executes a valid trade: prices it, validates, books the position
SELL side sends a negative quantity delta
FAILS CLOSED: market data unavailable → 503 and portfolio is NEVER called
does not book a position when pre-trade validation rejects
unknown symbol maps to 422, not a 500
reports the execution with the EXECUTED price, quantity, and side
a reporting outage NEVER fails the trade — trading halts are worse than late reports
rejected trades are NEVER reported — only executions are reportable
reporting stays disabled when no client is configured
opens a new long position at the fill price
keeps average unchanged when reducing
increases a long position with a weighted average price
flat position resets average to zero
rejects zero quantityDelta
applies a delta and returns 201
replaying the same idempotency key returns 200 and does NOT double-apply
rejects a float quantity with 400
rejects non-integer amounts — money is never a float
computes notional as integer minor units
rejects zero or negative quantity
returns a quote for a known symbol
returns 404 for an unknown symbol
GET /prices/:symbol returns the fields trade depends on
POST /positions/apply books a delta and returns the updated position
POST /executions submits an execution and returns the submission receipt
parses a valid quote
maps 404 to SYMBOL_NOT_FOUND
times out slow responses and fails closed
treats a malformed response body as unavailable — never trusts bad data
verifies all interactions
verifies all interactions
verifies all interactions
happy path: prices, validates, books → 201 EXECUTED
notional breach discovered at the REAL boundary → 422, portfolio untouched
slow market-data (beyond client timeout) → 503, FAILS CLOSED, no booking
malformed upstream response body → 503, never books against garbage data
BUY at the exact notional limit executes (boundary from live price)
an executed trade produces a MATCHED dual-sided pair under one UTI
SELL at the exact notional limit executes (boundary from live price)
EMIR reconciliation reports zero unmatched pairs and zero rejected sides
one share above the notional limit is rejected and books nothing
an executed BUY produces exactly one ACCEPTED report carrying the executed economics
fractional quantity (`2.5`) is rejected
zero quantity (`0`) is rejected
a SELL is reported with buyer/seller swapped — the classic mis-reporting defect
negative quantity (`-3`) is rejected
a rejected trade generates NO report — only executions are reportable
heals endpoint relocation and field renames, and records every event
escalates unhealable drift instead of guessing
an executed trade produces a MATCHED GIVE/TAKE pair with covered collateral
SFTR reconciliation reports zero unmatched pairs and zero rejected sides
a BUY trade executes at market price and the position is queryable
a SELL after a BUY nets the position to zero
an oversized trade is rejected end-to-end and books nothing
reconciliation stays consistent: accepted + rejected + enrichment failures ≤ executions received
